title: ayenia jaliscana
intro: Ayenia jaliscana, also known as Jaliscan ayenia, is a type of flowering plant in the Malpighiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ayenia jaliscana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antifungal and antibacterial properties. Ayenia jaliscana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile option for natural remedies.
